fallbackSourcesUsed: Yahoo Finance chart API public/unofficial endpoint
missing_evidence: Post-holiday live U.S. equity tape/source-confidence confirmation after markets reopen.
Per-holding source confidence fields are missing for current holdings with only latest available prior-session/local price tape.
Forward valuation / FCF yield / next catalyst fields are incomplete for several holdings.
No verified brokerage cost basis or user-provided allocation constraints; concentration/risk budget remains approximate.
Community/YouTube alternative-source hypotheses were not promoted because no validated claim changed action posture.
Comprehensive fresh web-search sweep unavailable after provider bot-detection; no retry performed per operating instruction.
Recovered comprehensive web/current-news sweep; prior web_search preflight was degraded, so this run used fetch/direct/local evidence only.
stale_data: U.S. equity and holding tape remains prior-session data because Monday, May 25, 2026 is a U.S. market holiday; do not treat as live Monday tape.
unsupported_claims: Any buy/add conclusion from opportunity-asymmetry alone is unsupported and remains blocked.
Any ticker promotion without primary evidence, price zone, invalidation, and risk budget is unsupported.
Any market-regime change inferred from missing Monday equity movement is unsupported during the holiday closure.
Any freshness/current-news conclusion beyond direct fetch/FRED/local evidence is unsupported in this cycle.
Any market-regime promotion from fetch-only evidence is unsupported.

failed_sources.reason: DuckDuckGo bot-detection challenge during market-holiday/current-news query; not retried by protocol

degraded_states: market-landscape: holiday data-truth update only; no market posture promotion
portfolio-translation: fresh tape but missing confidence/valuation fields
blocked holding confidence sources: MSFT, AMZN, CEG, META, TSLT, CONL, SPY, MA, BMNR, TSNF, NFLX
web research: partial_degraded_search_fetch_used; no comprehensive freshness claim
web research: fetch_only_degraded_no_web_search_retry; no comprehensive freshness claim
market-landscape: observation only; no market posture promotion
render_permission_reason: Render only degraded honesty/observation state; U.S. equity markets are closed for Memorial Day, holding confidence/valuation fields remain incomplete, and web/current-news coverage is degraded to fetch/direct/local evidence only. Deployment and new-capital posture stay blocked.
